name: Sunqueen Rectangle Acacia Wood Dining Table: Outdoor, Non-Extension, 6-Seater - Christopher Knight Home
description: This Christopher Knight Home Sunqueen Rectangle Acacia Wood Dining Table is a great addition to any backyard. Its smooth lines are very flattering and the slightly curved frame of the table helps soften the overall look. Combined with the acacia wood material, this table is great for all your outdoor needs. Great to use as a dining table or as a serving table, this Christopher Knight Home Sunqueen Rectangle Acacia Wood Dining Table does it all. A purchase you will enjoy for years to come.
